case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. CARL E OLSON et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT OLSON, CARL E OLSON, LINDA ARRIAZA, RAUL ARRIAZA, DENISE BERNSTEIN REALTY, INC. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-03-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-13-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
